events.title: Ann Arbor Civic Band — With Liberty and Justice for All
events.description: Free outdoor concert by the Ann Arbor Civic Band at Burns Park (1300 Baldwin Ave). Patriotic repertoire. 7:30–8:30pm.

events.title: Holly Near with Jan Martinelli — The Ark
events.description: Peace-focused folk singer integrating spiritual and theatrical elements across a 50-year career. One of the most distinctive voices in American folk.

events.description: Free outdoor lunchtime concert. Ann Arbor blues/rock artist Laith Al-Saadi headlines; Chris Buhalis opens. 11:30am–1:30pm.

events.title: Blake Whyte — The Ark
events.description: Soul/theatre songwriter-actor — theatrical storytelling through music, strong voice.

events.description: High-energy Utah bluegrass band known for raucous, fun performances. Pre-4th-of-July energy.

events.title: Pontiac Trail Blazers — Bluegrass Friday
events.description: The Pontiac Trail Blazers perform their bluegrass Friday residency at North Star Lounge with special guest Sequoia Rose.

events.title: Ann Arbor Jaycees 4th of July Parade
events.description: Annual parade — floats, marching bands, dance troupes. Route: S State & E William heading north on State, west on Liberty, south on 5th, east on William. Bring a lawn chair.

events.description: Isle of Man-born blues-rock guitarist with serious chops and an unmistakable style across acoustic, mandolin, and electric guitar.

events.description: Texas-born blues and soul guitarist brings his high-energy Honeybears band for a night of gut-bucket blues and soul.

events.title: Mark Jewett & The Strategic Advisors — The Ark
events.description: Michigan native storyteller Mark Jewett performs with his band in a blend of folk, rock, blues, and Americana.

events.title: Rolling Sculpture Car Show
events.description: Annual free outdoor classic, antique, and concept car show featuring 300+ automobiles spanning decades of automotive history on Main Street downtown.

events.title: Howie Day — The Ark
events.description: Singer-songwriter known for emotionally resonant lyrics and inventive melodies. Special guest Max Bartos.

events.title: Michigan Celtic Festival
events.description: Two-day Celtic festival opens Friday at 5pm. Highland athletics, pipe bands, Celtic music stages, Corgi Races, Ring of Steel live show. Main day Sat Jul 11, 10am–midnight. 5055 Ann Arbor-Saline Rd.

events.title: Brian Scolaro — Ann Arbor Comedy Showcase
events.description: National touring stand-up comedian Brian Scolaro headlines the Ann Arbor Comedy Showcase at 212 S 4th Ave.

events.description: GRAMMY-nominated British soul artist delivering timeless rhythm & soul with gritty vocals and sharp songwriting. Special guest McKinley James.

events.description: Full day: Highland athletics, pipe band competition, Celtic stages, Wee Folk Fun, Corgi Races, Ring of Steel. 10am–midnight.

events.description: Brian Scolaro continues his Ann Arbor Comedy Showcase run at 212 S 4th Ave.

events.title: Ann Arbor Art Fair
events.description: One of the nation's largest juried art fairs — nearly 1,000 artists across 30 city blocks. Three simultaneously running fairs: Street Art Fair, Summer Art Fair, State Street Art Fair. Thu Jul 16 10am–9pm, Fri Jul 17 10am–9pm. Last two days within your stay.
